utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified with required details: 1) destination: provided (Krakow, Poland) – ok. 2) travel_dates: provided with specific dates – ok. 3) transportation: should be flight details with costs. Provided only 'Budget Airlines Economy Class' and cost €100, but no flight details (airline, flight numbers/times/origins). While not itemized here, the components are present; this is acceptable as a complete cost total. Therefore, included items fully specified: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget = 6. Transportation is not fully specified.
